CTN 4, 093 [Consecration of priest][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...]

(flake 1') [...] a thread [...].

[...] ⸢qe₂⸣-[e ...]
flake 2'flake 2'

⸢munus dim₂⸣-ma tun₃-bi [...]

(flake 2') The wise woman [...] a cloth trimming.

sin-niš-ti ṭe-mi [...]
flake 3'flake 3'

um-ma dim₂-ma <<x>> ⸢si x⸣-[...]

(flake 3') The wise old woman [...] ....

pur-šum-ti ṭe-mi [...]
flake 4'flake 4'

dasar-lu₂-ḫi nam-šub ba-[an-šum₂]

(flake 4') Asarluhi (Akkadian: Marduk) delivered the incantation.

dAMAR.UTU šip-tu₂ [...]
flake 5'5'

ḫe₂-en-kug-ga ḫe₂-en-sikil-la ḫe₂-[en-dadag-ga]

(flake 5') May he purify, may he clean, may he brighten.

flake 6'6'

eme ḫul-ŋal₂ bar-še₃ ⸢ḫe₂⸣-[em-ta-gub]

(flake 6') May the evil tongue stand aside.

flake 7'7'

ka-inim-ma 7 tug₂ kug-ga-[kam]

(flake 7') 7(-line) formula for a pure garment.

flake 8'flake 8'

en₂ duttu munus sag₁₀-ga dumu den-lil₂-la₂ tu-ud-[da]

(flake 8') Incantation. Uttu, the good woman, child engendered by Enlil (Akkadian: daughter whom Ellil engendered), beloved of Enki, suitable in her person (Akkadian: beloved daughter of Ea who is suitable in person), put good wool (and) white wool from her sheep into her hands.

dMIN<(UTTU)> sin-niš-ti SIG₅tu₄ mar-ta ša₂ dEN.LIL₂ ul-[du-ši]
flake 9'flake 9'

ki-aŋ₂-ŋa₂ den-⸢ki⸣-ga-ke₄ su-na tum₃-ma-a

mar-tu₄ na-ram-ti de₂-a ša₂ ina!(BAD) zu-mur šu-lu-⸢kat⸣
flake 10'flake 10'

e-⸢ze₂⸣-ni-ta siki sag₁₀ siki babbar-ta šu-na im-ma-an-⸢ŋal₂⸣

ṣe-e-ni ši-pa-a-ti SIG₅-MEŠ ši-pa-a-ti pe-ṣa-tu₂ ana ŠU-MIN [x]
flake 11'flake 11'

tug₂bar-sig₉ šita kug!(ZA-)ga šu im-⸢mi⸣-in-sag₃ sa im-ma-ni-in-⸢gi⸣

(flake 11') She ... the headdress with a pure prayer (and) prepared it.

par₂-ši-ga ik-rib x x ep-ru-ti uš-ter-⸢si⸣
flake 12'flake 12'

lu₂azlag₂ <<GIŠ>> kalam-ma-ke₄ šu-na im-ma-an-šum₂

(flake 12') She entrusted it to the fuller of the land.

ana aš₂-la-ki ša₂ ma-a-ti ip-qid
flake 13'flake 13'

tug₂bar-sig₉ a kug-ga šu luḫ-luḫ-ḫa

(flake 13') The headdress is cleansed in pure water (Akkadian: He cleansed the headdress in pure water).

par₂-ši-ga ina me-⸢e? el?-lu?⸣-ti u₂-za-ak-ki
flake 14'flake 14'

šu sikil-ta šu ⸢su⸣-[ub-ba]-⸢su⸣-ub-ba-a

(flake 14') It is wiped off with clean hands.

ina qa-ti x [...] x
flake 15'flake 15'

dasar-lu₂-ḫi x [...]

(flake 15') Asarluhi (Akkadian: Marduk) ... [...].

⸢d⸣AMAR.UTU [...]
